title: Races (Fantasy Races)
body:
Races/Origin Datapack by Evilonesw.
The best Race/Origin Datapack for Minecraft
For Minecraft version 1.21+
This datapack gives you a giant amount of different races to choose from with each having several different perks/abilities and weaknesses

Some of the Races included in this pack are:
Human, Dwarf, Elf, Enderman, Blaze, Warden, Shulker, Breeze, Giant, Ant, Mermaid, Harpie, Chicken, Blaze, Zombie, Creeper, Ghost
10+ Races with several different abilities


Major updates
Version 1.00 Release


How to use
All races have both passive abilities and non passive abilities. Read the description below to see how to use it.
To obtain the powers you have to punch any mob and you will be given a one time use book with all the Races you can choose from. All you need to do is find the power you like and click it to choose it.
You can use the adminbook if cheats are enabled in your world for multiple power selections

Functions
/trigger evrace_menu will open up the datapack menu. In the menu you can access admin commands and toggle racial abilities/settings
/function races:uninstall will uninstall the datapack

Feel free to send a message on discord evilonesw#4363 if you have any suggestions of future races, or have any bugs you want to report.
Feel free to change the code around and experiment as you wish. Feel free to use in any youtube videos or other online media, please just give credit to me though if you do


Races
Human
Standard gameplay

Dwarf
1 block tall
Perks
Mines faster
Toggleable night vision. Use “/trigger evrace_settings” for settings to toggle on/off
Weaknesses
-0.5 to entity reach
Nausea above y level 250

Elf
Auto-step height of 1 block
2.1 Blocks tall
Perks
Increased speed and jump strength.
Faster attack speed
Half fall damage
Regeneration and saturation in sunlight.
Weaknesses
8 Hearts
On fire for double the time

Mermaid
Perks
Permanent water breathing, Water vision, Increased submerged mining speed, strength resistance, swim speed.
Super fast swim speed when holding CTRL
Weaknesses
Fire Burns for extra damage
Start to suffocate when out of water. Will take damage when out of air. Water breathing potion will negate effect

Enderman
2.9 Blocks tall
Perks
6 block and entity reach
Can teleport where looking. Use “/trigger evrace_settings” to toggle settings
Weaknesses
Take damage in the rain and in water

Blaze
Perks
Can fly
Shoots out a fireball. Use “/trigger evrace_settings” to toggle settings
Increased damage when on fire
Slow falling when sneaking
Weaknesses
Take huge damage in the rain and in water
Respawn in the nether

Warden
Perks
20 Hearts of health
10 attack damage
Sonic boom attack. Use “/trigger evrace_settings” to toggle settings
Weaknesses
Permanently blind

Shulker
Perks
Shulker levitation attack. Use “/trigger evrace_settings” to toggle settings
Armor ability. Armor increases while using and knockback decreases, but you can’t move and you are blind. Toggleable in settings
Weaknesses
Naturally slower
-1 to block and entity reach

Giant
4 Blocks tall
Perks
Increased jump height, damage, safe fall distance, reach, knockback resist, underwater breath, step height
20 hearts
When using a pickaxe 3x3 area is mined (toggleable in settings)
Weaknesses
Tripled fall damage
Slower attack speed
Always hungry

Breeze
Perks
Increased jump height, speed
Breeze charge ability. Use “/trigger evrace_settings” to toggle settings
No fall damage 
Weaknesses
Diamond or Netherite Armor slows you down

Wasp
0.05 Blocks tall
Perks
Increased jump height and speed
4 Damage base
Can fly. Use “/trigger evrace_settings” to toggle settings
Tiny Size
No fall damage 
Weaknesses
5 Hearts

Chicken
Perks
Slow falling

Zombie
Perks
6 Damage base
Undead mobs wont attack 
Weaknesses
Burns in sunlight, Fire damage (fire resistance will stop this effect)
Only eat meat

Creeper
Ability to explode killing yourself in the process. Use “/trigger evrace_settings” for settings

Ghost
Perks
Phase through blocks. Use “/trigger evrace_settings” for settings
Invisibility. Toggle in settings
Weaknesses
Burns in the sun (fire resist will stop effect)
7 Hearts

Slime
Perks
Jump boost.
When you die you half in size and come back to life with half the health to death location (2x)
Weaknesses
Slow when not jumping

Iron Golem
Perks
6 Damage hits + Knockback
Natural 6 Bars of armor
1+Entity reach distance
Weaknesses
Slow
Sink in water
1.5x fall damage

Creaking
Perks
Can harden like a creaking. Toggleable in settings
When nearby players look at you, you harden
Weaknesses
Fire/Lava does more damage

Spider
Perks
Poison punches
Climbing
Higher jump
Weaknesses
7 Hearts
Only eat meat

Vampire
Perks
Stronger, faster, higher jump, invisibility when crouching in shadows. Blood scent. Toggleable in settings. Hold CTRL+SNEAK to use
Attacking living mobs heals and feeds you.
Slowfall, toggle sneak/ perm/ off
Night vision, Toggle on/off/in darkness
Undead wont attack
Weaknesses
Burn for longer
Huge damage in the sun. Fire resistance will remove this effect
Cant eat food. Food will damage, nausea

Horse
Perks
Faster and higher jumping
Weaknesses
Vegetarian

Werewolf
Perks
Turn into a wolf at night. Wolf is bigger, does higher damage and is completely controllable. Night vision and high damage. Pressing CTRL attacks closest mob. CTRL also sinks in water. When wolf dies you die. Sneak to turn back
Weaknesses
Only eat meat
Iron allergy. Wearing iron Armor (chainmail too) or using iron tools will damage you. Getting hit with iron will do extra damage


Many more to come....


If you have any idea for new Races please message me or comment and I will try my best

Warning
Not all bugs are apparent, please let me know if you experience any. There is always the chance of compatibility issues with other Datapack's.
